message:
feat(conformance,release): expand reverse-round contracts and refresh validation reports

- Significantly expand reverse_round_contracts.v1.json with comprehensive
  new contract entries covering additional syscall replacement round-trip
  verification scenarios (2000+ new lines of contract specifications)
- Update dossier_validation_report.v1.json with refreshed release
  validation results reflecting the latest harness and script changes
- Refresh runtime_math admission gate, controller ablation, and controller
  manifest reports with updated test results from concurrent development
- Sync beads issues.jsonl with latest tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
